stylesPage.metaDescription: Shared Tailwind tokens and utilities used across Alixan UI documentation.
stylesPage.title: Styles
stylesPage.description: Shared Tailwind tokens and utilities used across examples and overlay components.

tailwind.title: Tailwind CSS
tailwind.description: Copy the shared CSS file from installation when you want the full theme tokens, base styles and utilities in one place.

textSize.title: Text Size
textSize.descriptionSuffix: for compact labels, menu items and dense form controls.

island.title: Island
island.descriptionSuffix: for bordered documentation blocks and compact panels. The radius is calculated from the block size and clamped to the theme radius scale.

backdrop.title: Backdrop
backdrop.description: standardizes overlay dimming for Dialog, Drawer, Global Loader and the mobile sidebar.

seoPage.metaDescription: SEO setup guide for Alixan UI documentation.
seoPage.title: SEO
seoPage.description: Configure shared site metadata, page-level SEO tags, favicon links, robots.txt and sitemap generation for a Nuxt project.

installation.title: Installation
installation.sitemapDescription: Install Nuxt Sitemap before adding sitemap options to nuxt.config.ts.
installation.seoCommandDescription: After copying, replace the example values in site.ts with your own domain, project name, default title, description and OG image.

siteConfig.title: Site Config
siteConfig.description: Keep domain, site name, default title, description and OG image in one config file so Nuxt config and runtime composables use the same values.
siteConfig.nuxtConfigSuffix: for Nuxt SEO modules such as sitemap.

pageMeta.title: Page Meta
pageMeta.description: centralizes title, description, Open Graph and Twitter tags. Pages only pass values that differ from defaults.
pageMeta.usageMiddle: in each page. If a field is omitted, the default from

initialHead.title: Initial Head
initialHead.faviconPrefix: Keep favicon links in a dedicated config file. PNG icons live in
initialHead.faviconSuffix: can stay at the public root.
initialHead.appInit: Initialize default page meta, document language and favicon links once near the app root.

robots.title: Robots
robots.descriptionSuffix: so crawlers can discover your sitemap. Replace the example domain with your production domain.

sitemap.title: Sitemap
sitemap.description: Sitemap helps search robots find available routes and understand which pages should be crawled.
sitemap.verify: After deployment, check that your sitemap is available from the URL used in robots.txt.
